MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-08-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-08-2022 HEARING RE: PETITIONER LUXURY MOTOR CARS LTD DBA MASERATI OF WALNUT CREEK'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE PETITION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion To Confirm Arbitration (Motions)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER LUXURY MOTOR CARS LTD DBA MASERATI OF WALNUT CREEK's Motion To Confirm Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the petition was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
